section.title: Getting started
section.intro: LLMs (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini) generate fluent text and fabricate facts with equal confidence.

resources.title: A Guide to Which AI to Use in the Agentic Era
resources.author: Ethan Mollick
resources.description: How to choose which AI tool, interface, and level of automation for different tasks.

resources.title: AI Snake Oil (Book & Blog)
resources.author: Arvind Narayanan & Sayash Kapoor
resources.description: Two Princeton computer scientists separate what AI can do from what's being oversold. Covers predictive AI (hiring algorithms, risk scores) and generative AI. The blog, now titled "AI as Normal Technology," tracks claims against evidence.

resources.title: The Shape of AI
resources.author: Ethan Mollick
resources.description: Where AI capability is advancing, where it's stuck, and why the boundary stays uneven.

resources.title: What AI Can Do With a Toolbox
resources.author: Ethan Mollick
resources.description: AI with internet access, code execution, and file analysis. What changes when the tools connect to the real world.

resources.title: Co-Intelligence: Living and Working with AI
resources.author: Ethan Mollick
resources.description: Working alongside AI – creativity, education, and organizational change.
